LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PAULO VATUVEI'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS AND REPRESENTATIVE ACTION SETTLEMENT. DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. DISCUSSIONS CONCLUDE, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS AND REPRESENTATIVE ACTION SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. Final Approval Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Final Approval Hearing.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for final approval of class and representative action settlement is granted.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Unopposed Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PAULO VATUVEI's Unopposed Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for final approval of class and representative action settlement is granted.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2021 Continued To Oct-13-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION / Notice Of Unopposed Motion & Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class And Representative Action Settlement
Off Calendar May-12-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Alex Katofsky, Esq. of Gaines & Gaines, APLC, 818.703.8985, for Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PLAINTIFF PAULO VATUVEI'S Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class And Representative Action Settlement.

The matter is called. DISCUSSIONS are held. At the conclusion of the discussions, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for preliminary approval of class and representative action settlement is granted.

The Final Approval Hearing is set for August 27, 2021 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302.

Order signed. (see order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
